Team Bernie -
I told you about the polls where we're so damn close -- down only by single digits in Ohio and Illinois and up by one in Missouri. We're also doing better in polls in Florida and North Carolina than we were before we won in Michigan.
But let me tell you where else we're so damn close: [**getting to 150,000 contributions made to our campaign from yesterday until midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160314s5-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160314s5-full")

Our campaign is only doing so well because - more than 5 million times - people like you have made a contribution to support Bernie. The money we raise to power our movement comes from you and you alone.
No super PACs. No millionaires or billionaires. Just you and our political revolution.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot,

I'll make this as simple as possible.
I support the Kentucky coal industry because
I support jobs and American energy.
Hillary Clinton does not support either of
those things.
She made that as clear as day this weekend
when she said "I will put coal out of business."
Can you believe a presidential candidate
would so gleefully cheer for the idea of putting thousands of
Americans out of work?

Will you sign my
petition to support coal and save jobs?

Liberals like Hillary always favor more
regulation over common sense. And that always leads to bad
policy.
Patriot, we know for a fact that the War on
Coal is a war on American jobs.
We've seen it the past 8 years. And frankly,
we've had enough of it from the Obama White House.
I will not let Hillary Clinton continue the
liberal failing legacy when it comes to coal.
I'm standing strong in support of Kentucky
coal and the hardworking members of the industry.
Are you with me?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

---
| Peter, With the polls opening this morning in today's critically important primary, I wanted to send you a quick note to thank you for all of your support! It means so much to us that you have continued to stand by us. Running for President of the United States has been the greatest honor of our lives. As you know, this campaign has not been easy, but Marco and I are content in knowing that we have your support and prayers. You can count on this: Marco will continue to rise above the attacks and not resort to the level of slander and lies that his opponents have directed his way. I know we've counted on you many times before, but I wanted to ask you today if there is any way we could ask for your help one more time. With Floridians heading to the polls this morning, **[your donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615539:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)** today will go immediately towards bolstering Marco's voter outreach and campaign efforts here.
Peter, I've asked Marco's digital team to help me create these links just for you to make a donation today. [**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615540:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615541:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615542:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615543:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615544:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615545:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615546:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $500**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615547:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)[**dpwillis67@gmail.com Support Marco with $1000**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615548:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)
---
| This campaign has been a long haul, but it's also been an incredibly humbling experience. We have had the privilege of meeting hardworking Americans from all walks of life in every corner of our great country, and especially here in Florida these last couple of weeks. As a proud wife and mother of our four wonderful children, I wish you could see Marco through our eyes. Marco is a true gentleman; he is a hardworking and honest man. More importantly though, once the cameras are gone, we are just like you and your family. We share the same joys -- going to church, sporting events, family reunions -- and we also share your same concerns: _What kind of culture will our children grow up in? Is our nation going to be safe in 5, 10, 25 years? What is going to happen to our parent 's Social Security and Medicare?_ Peter, these concerns have been exacerbated under President Obama, but with a Rubio White House we will be able to rest assured that our nation will be safe, our children's future will be prosperous, and our retirement will be secure. Marco is the experienced leader we need to take back our nation and restore our economy, but he can only do so with your immediate support. **[So, please join me in making a much-needed contribution toward our Florida Victory Fund.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615539:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)** On behalf of myself and our children, thank you for your support and prayers. Jeanette Rubio P.S. Your kindness and prayers have fueled our family throughout this campaign and I am so grateful. We wouldn't be able to run this campaign if it weren't for you, and I will never forget your gratitude and generosity. Team Marco is what it is because of you! So, please Peter, let's make history and win Florida! **[Show your continued support right now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46615539:6VVdigrNm:m:1:1349778030:5B8D84C163A14C8602DCD7D533ACBAFF:r)**
---

name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

This election, a
conservative revolution is underway - one that will stop
President Obama's backwards agenda of stifling job creation and
opening borders, of raising taxes and squelching small businesses
- and if Republicans continue to unite, we can bring back hope
and opportunity to our kids and grandkids.

It's clear that this
is now a two-man race, and voters have a choice between a
consistent conservative, like Ted Cruz, who will work for the
people or a candidate, like Donald Trump, who has as much
experience "making deals", supporting Democrats with tens of
thousands of dollars of contributions, and a history of holding
nearly identical policy positions as Hillary Clinton.

If you are one of the
65 to 70 percent of Republicans across this country who recognize
that Donald Trump is not the best choice to go head to head with
Hillary Clinton, we ask you to join us so that together we can
get the government out of our lives so that, the American people,
the real source of prosperity, will once again flourish. And if
you're in Florida, Illinois, Missouri, North Carolina, or Ohio,
Ted needs your vote today!

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: Rob Portman
subject: I'm asking for your vote!
body:
| [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=1) Peter -- Today is Primary Election Day and I'm asking for your vote!

I am proud of our record of breaking through the partisan gridlock and getting things done for Ohio families, from tax relief for small businesses to regulatory reform to tackling the heroin and prescription drug epidemic. I need your help to be able to continue serving the Buckeye State.

We've hit the ground running with the campaign -- since May of last year, we've contacted over 1.3 million voters, we have over 250 county chairs across Ohio's 88 counties, and we've launched our African American Leadership Council, Veterans Leadership Council, Students for Portman, Women for Portman, and Sportsmen for Portman coalitions. We're organized on over 30 college campuses. We are ready for a tough election!

National Democrats have said that the road to winning the White House and the Senate Majority runs right through Ohio. That's why they've already spent over $1 million attacking me on TV across Ohio.

The stakes are high in Ohio. Voters are going to have a clear choice this November between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for higher wages and more jobs or a return to former Governor Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, burdensome regulations and bigger government.

Please make sure you vote today -- [you can find your polling location by clicking here.](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.state.oh.us%2FSOS%2FUpload%2Fsites%2FballotTracking%2FballotTracking.aspx%3Fpage%3D20547&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=2) Jane and I appreciate your support and we look forward to continuing to work with you in fighting for a brighter future for Ohio! All best,

Rob Portman

[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=3) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=5)[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/february_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voteprimary&n=6)

Peter, A new poll released yesterday confirmed what we already knew: | _" With the Democratic primary looming, **former Congressman Joe Sestak remains Senator Pat Toomey 's closest competitor** for the general election, according to the new Mercyhurst Poll."_ - PoliticsPA, 3/14/16
---
**Five-plus years out of office, and we 're just 5 points down on Sen Toomey - within the poll's margin of error - and with _our closest primary opponent almost three times as far behind us._**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171940d/3476a20e/c66bf40/274558d3/3508683265/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0315FBb1&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Peter, Pat Toomey is one of the most obstructionist Senators in DC, from his calling an 11-month Supreme Court vacancy "not that big a deal" to describing his filibuster of a transportation bill as doing "something constructive ... I told you we'd kill it and we did."
It is critical that we replace Toomey with a new Senator committed to a Supreme Court that functions and roads ready for commerce and safe for travel.

body:
This campaign is built on resilience | Friend --

I can’t tell you how grateful I am that you’re a part of Hillary’s team. We’ve had some tough days on this campaign, but every time we run up against a new obstacle, you find a way to dig a little deeper, fight a little harder, and keep moving forward.

That’s what this team is all about. No matter how many times anybody knocks you down, you’re not going to let them knock you out. It’s a good thing, too, because that’s the only way we’re going to win this nomination and the White House.

Today is one of the most important days of this campaign: We’ve got five big primaries with hundreds of delegates at stake. Our campaign has been outraised, and as a result, we’re being outspent in many of those states. But you know what? We can win anyway.

Dear Friend:

Tonight, there is no ambiguity.

**I'm the only candidate that has defeated Trump outside my home state, that can unify all conservatives, and who has a pathway to win the delegates necessary to earn the nomination.**

I've been telling you: this is a ONE-ON-ONE race between me and Donald Trump.

We put the Washington Cartel and the D.C. establishment on notice...their days in power are numbered.

Friend, you are the backbone of this campaign, and without you I would not be in the position to secure this nomination.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

But to continue -- I still have a long road to the nomination.

It all comes down to this: **with your immediate help and financial support -- I will beat Donald Trump one-on-one for the GOP nomination and defeat Hillary Clinton in November.** Without your continued help, Donald Trump -- with his supposed billions and media driven bully pulpit -- will win the nomination and lose to Hillary Clinton.

So, I have to ask for a special favor tonight.

Are you still with me?

body:
You have to be the one to stop Trump | Friend --

Tonight, Donald Trump could become the presumptive Republican nominee for president.

It’s worth taking a second to remember how we got here: For months, we watched the GOP basically leave him alone. They didn’t take him seriously, they didn’t pay attention -- they just crossed their fingers and hoped that he’d go away by himself. By the time the other GOP candidates decided to attack Trump, it was too late, and now he’s almost certainly going to be their nominee.

It’d be easy for us Democrats to do the same thing now -- Trump is so offensive, so vulgar, so self-evidently awful. You could look at him and think, "there’s no way he’ll ever get elected," and then just wish him away.

But we can’t. Trump can win a general election if people like you and me assume that he’ll collapse under his own weight, that someone else is going to stop him. If all we do is hope that everyone’s going to come to their senses, we’re going to be watching President Trump’s inauguration come January.

**If you want Donald Trump to lose, you have to be the one to stop him. Chip in, help us hit our one million donor goal, and let’s stop Trump:**

Christina

By the time the other GOP candidates decided to attack Trump, it was too late, and now he’s almost certainly going to be their nominee. It’d be easy for us Democrats to do the same thing now -- Trump is so offensive, so vulgar, so self-evidently awful. You could look at him and think, "there’s no way he’ll ever get elected," and then just wish him away. But we can’t. Trump can win a general election if people like you and me assume that he’ll collapse under his own weight, that someone else is going to stop him. If all we do is hope that everyone’s going to come to their senses, we’re going to be watching President Trump’s inauguration come January. If you want Donald Trump to lose, you have to be the one to stop him. Chip in, help us hit our one million donor goal, and let’s stop Trump: --- ]() Thanks, Christina Christina Reynolds Deputy Communications Director Hillary for America Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors standing with her: | --- ]() | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. Peter, We are releasing our first TV ad tomorrow, but it's **yours to view before it airs** because of everything you have given and done to help put me in such a strong position. You've had my back, and because of your support, our ad will let all of Pennsylvania know: **" I've got your six!"** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171941d/3476a20e/c67fc46/27455232/2778893542/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0315g1")

---
Our ad uses a common military term for having someone's back - "I've got your six" - to explain why I want to serve: to have people's six.
In fact, it's why I entered public life in the first place after my daughter recovered from brain cancer: to pay back the nation for the military healthcare that saved her, by passing Obamacare so that everybody might have their six covered.
It's why in Congress, I also:
* passed the first new federal funding into autism treatment in 12 years - because I wanted families to know I had their six
* serviced 18,000 constituent cases in four years - four times the average congressional office - because I wanted everyone who walked in our door to know I had their six
* passed legislation to fund elder abuse protection and prosecution departments at the local, state and federal levels - because I wanted senior citizens to know I had their six

[Please help me have your six again. Contribute today by clicking the button below so that you can have a Senator who has your six!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171941d/3476a20e/c67fc46/27455230/2778893542/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0315p1")

---
And please share our ad with your friends and family so that they know I've got their six too!
Warmly,
Joe

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: The results are coming in - thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I am so grateful for you. | Friend --

Polls are beginning to close -- and while we don't know what will happen in Florida, Ohio, North Carolina, Illinois, and Missouri tonight, I do know one thing. I am so grateful for you.

Because of you, our volunteers, and the more than 950,000 Americans who've contributed to this campaign, we've built a strong, nimble organization across the country -- our delegate lead continues to grow, and we're getting even closer to securing this nomination and winning this election.

But we can't get complacent. This race is going to go on for a while. **[I need you to chip in right now if you're with me.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ5ODc2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYyNjM2MDY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The results on the other side make this clearer than ever: This may be the most consequential election of our lifetimes.

President Obama used to talk about the gap between the magnitude of our challenges and the smallness of our politics. The gap has grown beyond anything we could have imagined -- some of what we've seen and heard from Donald Trump and other Republican candidates defies belief.

We can't allow ourselves to be defined by the ugliest impulses of the radical fringe. We can't risk having a commander in chief who would embarrass our country, alienate our allies, and embolden our enemies. The stakes are too high and the job is too big to leave up to chance.

The president has to make critical decisions and tackle incredible challenges -- ones as big as the world and as small as your kitchen table.

Trump can't do the job. We're going to win this nomination, then take the fight to him to make sure he never gets the chance.

**Stand with me. Donate right now and say you're on my side:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ5ODc2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYyNjM2MDY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ5ODc2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYyNjM2MDY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you so much. There might be a long night ahead of us, but I believe in what we will accomplish together -- tonight, tomorrow, and in the months to come.

Hillary

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to help us reach our goal of one million donors:**
